text:
Author: swills
Date: Thu Nov 14 16:35:15 2013
New Revision: 333770
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333770

Log:
  - Update to 0.14

Modified:

  head/devel/p5-Term-Sk/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/p5-Term-Sk/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Term-Sk/Makefile	Thu Nov 14 16:23:54 2013	(r333769)
+++ head/devel/p5-Term-Sk/Makefile	Thu Nov 14 16:35:15 2013	(r333770)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Term-Sk
-PORTVERSION=	0.13
+PORTVERSION=	0.14
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:KEICHNER
@@ -16,7 +16,4 @@ LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 
-MAN3=		Term::Sk.3
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Term-Sk/distinfo	Thu Nov 14 16:23:54 2013	(r333769)

+SIZE (Term-Sk-0.14.tar.gz) = 10533

Modified: head/devel/p5-Term-Sk/pkg-plist
==============================================================================

+++ head/devel/p5-Term-Sk/pkg-plist	Thu Nov 14 16:35:15 2013	(r333770)

 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Term/Sk/.packlist
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Term::Sk.3.gz
